title: About me
text:
I’m an undergraduate student at TU Eindhoven, studying Applied Mathematics, originally from India.
I am interested in the field of Mathematics and Computer Science, hoping to explore both fields extensively henceforth!
I am familiar with languages like .py, .tex and learning .typ and .r.
